# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-compute
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-10
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx

- name: app-sql
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    project: $(ref.project)
    database: app-db
    instance: app-sql-instance
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "00:00"
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0

- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: app-bucket-$(ref.project)
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    name: app-forwarding-rule
    region: us-central1
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.app-target-proxy)

- name: app-target-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    name: app-target-proxy
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map)

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    name: app-url-map
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service)

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    name: app-backend-service
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-instance-group)
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check)

- name: app-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
  properties:
    name: app-instance-group
    zone: us-central1-a
    instances:
    - zone: us-central1-a
      instance: $(ref.app-compute)

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    name: app-health-check
    host: ""
    requestPath: /
    port: 80
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
